name: ruflo-intelligence
description: User-facing surface for Ruflo's self-learning system: 6 neural_* + 10 hooks_intelligence_* + 9 routing/meta hooks + 4 SONA/MicroLoRA tools (29 total). Implements the 4-step pipeline (RETRIEVE → JUDGE → DISTILL → CONSOLIDATE) and IPFS-based cross-project pattern transfer.

interface.shortDescription: Self-learning intelligence layer with SONA neural patterns, model routing, and cross-project transfer
interface.longDescription: User-facing surface for Ruflo's self-learning system: 6 neural_* + 10 hooks_intelligence_* + 9 routing/meta hooks + 4 SONA/MicroLoRA tools (29 total). Implements the 4-step pipeline (RETRIEVE → JUDGE → DISTILL → CONSOLIDATE) and IPFS-based cross-project pattern transfer.
defaultPrompt: Use ruflo-intelligence to apply learned patterns and route models for this Codex task
